task_objective: Multi-Pose Model Try-On & 9-View 3x3 - Map Image 2 model+outfit onto Image 1's 9 poses (ONLY pose changes, model identity + outfit FULLY PRESERVED)

input_assets.pose_reference: Image 1 9-Pose Grid - 9 distinct poses (body position, limb angles, posture, hand placement, camera angle, composition) - ONLY Provide poses
input_assets.model_image: Image 2 Model (VARIABLE) - Facial features, skin tone, body proportions, hairstyle, clothing/outfit - FULLY PRESERVED, ZERO deviation

workflow.step_1: Extract all 9 poses from Image 1 + analyze Image 2 model identity & outfit details (style, color, pattern, material)
workflow.step_2: Map Image 2 model+outfit onto each of 9 poses, ONLY pose changes to Image 1, model identity & outfit 100% preserved
workflow.step_3: Generate 9 views, assemble 3x3 grid matching Image 1 layout, consistent lighting & background

outputs.view_1: Pose 1 - Image 2 model+outfit in Image 1 pose 1, exact body position & camera angle
outputs.view_2: Pose 2 - Image 2 model+outfit in Image 1 pose 2, exact body position & camera angle
outputs.view_3: Pose 3 - Image 2 model+outfit in Image 1 pose 3, exact body position & camera angle
outputs.view_4: Pose 4 - Image 2 model+outfit in Image 1 pose 4, exact body position & camera angle
outputs.view_5: Pose 5 - Image 2 model+outfit in Image 1 pose 5, exact body position & camera angle
outputs.view_6: Pose 6 - Image 2 model+outfit in Image 1 pose 6, exact body position & camera angle
outputs.view_7: Pose 7 - Image 2 model+outfit in Image 1 pose 7, exact body position & camera angle
outputs.view_8: Pose 8 - Image 2 model+outfit in Image 1 pose 8, exact body position & camera angle
outputs.view_9: Pose 9 - Image 2 model+outfit in Image 1 pose 9, exact body position & camera angle

output_requirements: NO text/labels/watermarks; ALL 9 poses MUST be identical to Image 1 — zero deviation in body position, limb angles, posture, camera angle
Model identity + outfit MUST remain exactly as Image 2 — consistent facial features, skin tone, proportions, hairstyle, CLOTHING across all 9 views
Natural body mechanics in each pose; realistic proportions; consistent lighting & background across all views
SFW; realistic fabric draping; NO oily shine; NO oversaturation; All 9 poses must be generated — no missing or merged poses
Premium 3x3 - matching Image 1 grid layout, cinematic grading, luxury white space
